title: Feuilleea marginata
taxonomy: Feuilleea marginata is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. The Celastraceae family is part of the larger order Celastrales, which contains approximately 95 genera of flowering plants. The order Celastrales is further classified within the clade Rosidae, a large group of flowering plants that includes over 100 families. The classification of Feuilleea marginata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plant species.

It has been employed in various cultures to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds.
